dialogueChunks.intro: The mine {location_hint} collapsed this morning. Workers are trapped below. The worst part: we were warned the supports were failing, and someone decided to keep digging anyway.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} tried to stop the expansion, but the foreman pushed ahead for more {quest_item}. Now {quest_focus} has buried at least four workers. The {enemy_type} have been spotted near the surface entrance, drawn by the commotion.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those people don't have long, {player_name}. We need someone to clear the entrance, drive off the {enemy_type}, and get supplies to the trapped workers before {quest_stakes} are lost.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone did something very stupid. A group of hotheads from the settlement attacked an {enemy_type} nest near {location_hint}, thinking they'd be heroes. They poked the nest and ran.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Now {quest_focus} has erupted. The {enemy_type} are retaliating with everything they have, and they're heading straight for {quest_stakes}. {quest_ally} is organizing a defense, but the horde is larger than anything we've prepared for.
dialogueChunks.outro: The idiots who caused this are nursing their wounds. We need someone capable to get out there and reduce {quest_threat} before it overwhelms our defenses. {player_name}, can you fight?

playerResponses.text: Point me at them. I'll thin the numbers.
Your people caused this, but I'll help.

dialogueChunks.intro: The bridge to {location} is gone. A campfire left unattended caught the supports, and the whole structure went up overnight. Our only reliable supply route is severed.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is furious. That bridge was our lifeline for {quest_item} and other essentials. {quest_ally} says we can establish an alternate route {location_hint}, but it passes through {enemy_type} territory and needs to be secured first.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need materials, we need the path cleared, and we need it done before {quest_threat} cuts us off completely. {player_name}, will you help open the new route?

playerResponses.text: I'll clear the route and gather what's needed.
